note: Created test/models/event_model_edge_cases_test.dart with 26 tests covering: unknown event types, UTC timestamp parsing (Z-suffix vs local), multiple nested buffs/pokemon/promoCodes, integer-to-double multiplier coercion, full JSON→EventDto→EventTimeDisplay pipeline, _toDisplayTime re-wrapping logic, DST boundary + model parsing combined, boolean field combinations, and BuffCategory mapping through EventDto. All 121 tests pass (26 new + 95 existing).
